## Daily Checklist
- [ ] Verify staging hardware status: SBC, HSM devkit, modem, LoRa gateway
- [ ] Check battery/UPS health and charge levels
- [ ] Confirm provisioning scripts are present and secret-free
- [ ] Schedule or confirm next drill; update DRILL-CHECKLIST.md
- [ ] Archive provisioning logs and smoke test outputs

## Notes
- Hardware issues:
- Next drill schedule:
